Summary: Cart UI shows incorrect quantity after add multiple items
Creator: Uzair Shamsi
Description:
*steps to reproduce:*

# Open the product page 
# Add different products 4 to 5
# Go to cart page


*Expected results* : UI shows correct quantity of products and correct bill
*Actual result*:  Cart UI shows only 1 item in cart but shows all 5 products bill.
*Impact*  :

Bad user experience

Mismatch between UI and billing

Can reduce user trust

Summary: user data does not save when Internet disconnect during submission
Creator: Uzair Shamsi
Description:
steps to reproduce:

# open form page
# fill all required info
# disconnect internet before form submitting
# click submit

expected Result: system should show error or retry option

Actual resulr : all data is gone and form page is reset

impact : Poor user experience and data loss
